final_prompt.prompt:
Create a children's picture book illustration of a forest concert scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "儿童绘本" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Eric Carle's bold cut-paper illustration tradition, 1980s–90s Japanese 絵本 (Ghibli-adjacent storybook illustration), Beatrix Potter's gentle woodland character heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a rabbit playing cello and a squirrel playing flute as the focal performers; must include other cute small animals as audience / ensemble
Scene/backdrop: must include a fairytale forest setting with 蘑菇屋 (mushroom cottages) and a rainbow in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, wonder-filled daytime atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, bright, and lively direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
